# Paper Claim Strength Table

| Claim type | Evidence needed |
|---|---|
| Mechanism possible | formal model + source showing proxy exists |
| Mechanism plausible | model + empirical literature + case evidence |
| Pattern suspicious | public data above null model + qualitative anomalies |
| Coordination likely | repeated co-action + content similarity + actor links |
| Deception likely | coordination + undisclosed incentives/fake identity |
| Proven misconduct | regulator finding, admission, internal documents, or court record |
